# defectdojo_product_type_group (Resource)

DefectDojo Product Type Group

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "defectdojo_product_type_group" "example" {
  product_type = 1
  group        = 1
  role         = 2
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group` (Number) The ID of the Dojo Group
- `product_type` (Number) The ID of the Product Type
- `role` (Number) The role ID for this product type group membership

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier
